description_long: This apartment building features a modern, rectangular design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is primarily white with large, continuous bands of blue-tinted glass windows wrapping around two sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The building appears to have three main floors above a recessed ground level, which is supported by dark columns or pillars, creating an open, airy base. The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, with some smaller, square windows on the shorter facades. There is a prominent overhanging section on one end, adding architectural interest and possibly housing additional amenities or communal spaces. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, white apartment building with blue-tinted glass bands, flat roof, and a recessed ground floor supported by dark columns. The design is sleek and minimalist, with regular window patterns and a prominent overhanging section.
description_view_0: The long side of the building shows a grid of small, square windows and a solid white facade, with the overhanging section visible on the right.
description_view_1: The short end reveals two wide bands of blue-tinted glass and the open, column-supported ground floor beneath the upper stories.
description_view_2: The opposite long side displays continuous blue-tinted glass windows across all floors, emphasizing the building's modern style and open feel.
description_view_3: The other short end mirrors view 1, with blue-tinted glass bands and the dark, open ground level, but without the overhanging section.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern on the solid facades, while the longer sides feature continuous horizontal bands of glass, creating a uniform and symmetrical appearance.
